title: Add spec compliance tests for 0.4.0 runtime
summary: Add tests that assert 0.4.0 spec compliance for taxonomy, invariants, legacy artifacts, and resume logic.
outputs: Tests covering taxonomy alignment and invariant enforcement
Tests asserting legacy artifacts are ignored in canonical flow
Tests for semantic memory-driven next_action derivation
acceptance_criteria: Tests fail if non-taxonomy tx event types are emitted.
Tests fail if intent-before-mutation or ordering invariants are violated.
Tests fail if resume logic uses legacy artifacts or ignores semantic memory.

steps.description: Add tests for event taxonomy alignment and invariant enforcement.
Add tests asserting legacy artifacts are ignored in canonical resume.
Add tests for semantic memory and next_action derivation.

notes: Keep tests deterministic and aligned with v0.4.0 specs.
Prefer narrow unit tests that isolate each invariant.
